label: Road gen step: dry with fallback
description: Dries wet terrain along the road path, replacing it with a fallback terrain when it cannot be dried.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# RoadDefGenStep subclass that implements this generation step.

chancePerPositionCurve.label: Chance per position curve
chancePerPositionCurve.description: Piecewise linear curve mapping distance from the road center (x) to placement probability (y) for each map cell.

antialiasingMultiplier.label: Antialiasing multiplier
antialiasingMultiplier.description: Scales how far the placement probability extends past the hard road edge to produce smooth borders. Set to 0 to disable antialiasing for this step.

periodicSpacing.label: Periodic spacing
periodicSpacing.description: When non-zero, placement is restricted to positions that are multiples of this distance along the road, producing evenly spaced decorations.

fallback.label: Fallback terrain
fallback.description: TerrainDef placed when the cell cannot be dried -- i.e. when it is impassable or a river tile after the drying pass.
